emotional_tone: Rigorous, scholarly, authoritative, highly professional, no-nonsense.

typography.instructions: Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for all application chrome (menus, sidebars, buttons, toolbars). Use 'Merriweather' strictly for the text inside the IMRAD rich-text editor to simulate academic reading. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for the JATS XML preview and code blocks.

colors.instructions: Rely strictly on 1px solid borders for separation. No soft shadows. High contrast text against dark backgrounds. Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for standard text. Highlight validation errors sharply with the error color.

layout.container: h-screen w-full flex flex-col overflow-hidden bg-app
layout.header: h-12 border-b border-default flex items-center justify-between px-4 shrink-0
layout.left_sidebar: w-64 border-r border-default flex flex-col bg-panel shrink-0 overflow-y-auto
layout.center_editor: flex-1 flex flex-col bg-editor_surface overflow-hidden relative
layout.right_sidebar: w-80 border-l border-default flex flex-col bg-panel shrink-0 overflow-y-auto
layout.spacing: Use tight spacing (p-2, p-4, gap-2) to maximize information density. Everything should fit compactly like an IDE (VS Code).

components.buttons: Flat, 1px border if secondary, solid background if primary. Slight hover brightness increase.
components.cards: Zero radius or 4px max. 1px border. No shadows.
components.inputs: Flat, 1px border, background matches panel. Focus ring 1px solid accent_primary.
components.badges: Used for status (Draft, Published). Tiny text, 2px radius, border matching text color with 10% opacity background.
components.tabs: Linear style. Active tab has a bright bottom border or high contrast text, inactive is muted. No pill shapes.
components.xml_preview: Terminal look inside. Deep black background, syntax highlighting in neon blue, green, and orange.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Instant color change or 0.1s transition. No bouncy animations.
interactions_and_motion.validation_panel: When an error is clicked, smoothly scroll to the corresponding field in the editor.

assets.icons: @phosphor-icons/react (Weight: Regular for UI, Fill for active states)

specific_features.dashboard: Table view of articles with columns: Title, Authors, Status, Volume, Issue, Year. Search input and filter dropdowns above the table.
specific_features.imrad_editor: A rich text surface divided by sections (Introduction, Methods, etc.). Each section is clearly delineated. Include toolbar for math, citations, tables.
specific_features.metadata_form: Grid-based form layout. Multi-author management should look like a draggable list or grid of compact cards.
specific_features.validation_auto_panel: Always visible on the right or bottom. Live-updating list of warnings (missing DOI) and errors (missing Abstract).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 100vh layout simulating a professional desktop IDE.
Implement Shadcn UI heavily but strip away any soft rounded corners. Use maximum 4px border-radius.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs).
Ensure dark mode is the default and looks natively dark, not inverted.
Simulate the JATS XML syntax highlighting in the preview tab.
Implement the 'Autosave' indicator in the top header.
Ensure the application structure supports tabbed navigation in the center pane (Editor, Metadata, XML, PDF).
